question: Implement a function in C++ that receives a string and modifies it by reversing its contents using pass-by-reference. Signature: void reverseString(std::string& str);

test_cases.expected:
Original string: Hello World
Reversed string: dlroW olleH

errors: Function uses pass-by-value instead of pass-by-reference
String won't be modified in main function because parameter is copied, not referenced
